auth.passwordHint: Use at least 12 characters. A password manager is recommended.
auth.signInWelcome: Welcome back. Use the email and password your administrator gave you.
auth.rateLimited: Too many failed attempts. Try again in a few minutes.
auth.locked: This account is temporarily locked. Contact your administrator.

setup.title: Welcome
setup.subtitle: Let's create your owner account. You'll be the only person with access until you invite others.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: One place, one source of truth for the current payroll run.
dashboard.currentRunHint: Foundation phase. The orchestrator and run-card UI ship in Phase 3.
dashboard.noActiveRunDescription: The first run will be scheduled automatically once the cron job is enabled in Settings → Automation.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Every operational behavior lives here. Change a value, the system follows.

company.title: Company
company.description: Name, address, brand color, and locale. The brand color cascades to PDFs and the UI.
company.name: Company name

phase.title: Lands in Phase {n}
phase.description: The data model and defaults are in place. The editing UI ships when this phase is built.

employee.homeIntro: The employee app ships in Phase 4. You can sign in here today; the rest comes online soon.
employee.thisWeekHint: Hours and projected pay will appear here.
